param.name: warebasket
param.comment: Wares. list of wares that takes precedence over any defined warebasket

param.name: range
param.default: if @this.ship.commanderentity.$config_subordinate_range then @this.ship.commanderentity.$config_subordinate_range else (if @this.ship.commander.jobmainsector then this.ship.commander.jobmainsector else (if @this.ship.commander.isclass.[class.station, class.buildstorage] then this.ship.commander.sector else (if this.ship.jobmainsector then this.ship.jobmainsector else this.sector)))
param.comment: Anchor space

param.name: strictgathersector
param.comment: If set, gathering spaces are hard-locked to this sector.

param.name: minbuy
param.comment: Min gate distance to gather resources. Gathering range supported if $minsell and $maxsell are provided

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 24 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 0 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 2 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 4 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 9 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 14 else 24) else 0), 0].max

param.name: maxbuy
param.comment: Max gate distance to gather resources. Gathering range supported if $minsell and $maxsell are provided

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

param.name: minsell
param.comment: Min gate distance to sell resources. Sell range supported if $minsell and $maxsell are provided

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 24 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 0 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 2 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 4 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 9 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 14 else 24) else 0), 0].max

param.name: maxsell
param.comment: Max gate distance to sell resources. Sell range supported if $minsell and $maxsell are provided

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

param.name: deepspace
param.comment: Operate in deep space. Operate only in deep space. Currently defined as 100 +/- 50km from sector core edge

param.name: resourcescout
param.comment: Scout for resources. Visibly look for resources before mining

param.name: logbookentries
param.comment: Forwarded from GalaxyMiner order setup. Controls miner queue-time logbook messages while leaving XP transfer signals active.

param.name: allowIllegal
param.comment: Forwarded from GalaxyMiner order setup. When true, ship may carry/trade illegal wares.

param.name: enforceRouteIllegalLegality
param.comment: Forwarded from GalaxyMiner order setup. Illegal Route Filter for sell-leg path planning.

param.name: duration
param.comment: Duration. Only accounts for time spent executing this order.

param.name: endtime
param.comment: Absolute game time in seconds, after which order will end. Overrides duration. For internal use. Do not use with default orders.

param.name: effectiveskill
param.comment: Effective skill level used for skill checks

param.name: preferownspace
param.comment: Only search for resources in spaces owned by our faction. If none are found, a fallback sector will be used.

param.name: playerStationsOnly
param.comment: If true, only player-owned stations are valid demand/sell targets for free miners.

param.name: primaryTargetStations
param.comment: Primary Galaxy Miner delivery stations (home + explicit targets).

param.name: blockedstations
param.comment: Stations excluded by the Galaxy Miner order setup.

param.name: overflowSellMode
param.comment: When true, all primary stations are at/above overflow threshold for current ware.

param.name: allowOverflowSellToOthers
param.comment: If true, overflow may be sold beyond primary target stations.

param.name: overflowThreshold
param.comment: Primary station fill threshold (percent) before overflow behavior applies.

param.name: physicalStorageAbortPercent
param.comment: Headroom above station physical stock (percent) before level-6+ pilots stop collecting slice ware. 0 = disabled. Forwarded from GalaxyMiner order.

param.name: checkDemandFirst
param.comment: Forwarded from GalaxyMiner order. Physical storage gate is skipped when false (stockpile mode).

param.name: warebasket_override
param.comment: Wares (Manual). Only use this warebasket or a subset thereof.

param.name: precomputedgatherspaces
param.comment: Caller-supplied gather sector list (skips lib.find.sectors.inrange when non-empty).

param.name: resolvedsector
param.comment: Caller-resolved mining sector (skips engine resource search when set with resolvedpos).

param.name: resolvedpos
param.comment: Caller-resolved mining position paired with resolvedsector.

param.name: deliveryonly
param.comment: CARGO-FIRST delivery slice: sell in-bay cargo without asteroid locate or mining.

param.name: debugchance
param.comment: Print debug output

param.name: debugchance2
param.comment: Verbose debug output

handler.comment: handler kept local since it modifies a value local to this script

debug_text.text: 'updated operational range for %1(%2) to %3(%4)'.[this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $range.knownname, $range]
'PATCH: minbuy is greater than maxbuy. cannot find spaces. resetting minbuy to 0.'
'PATCH: minsell is greater than maxsell. cannot find spaces. resetting minsell to 0.'
'PATCH: old anchor space was hostile. changing to %s %s.'.[$range.class, $range.knownname]
'PATCH: probesectors populated with %s sectors.'.[$probesectors.count]
'PATCH: Resetting anchor from %s %s to %s %s.'.[@$range.knownname, $range, @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$range.knownname, @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$range]
'PATCH: $ware %s not in warebasket. restarting.'.[$ware]
'minbuy is greater than maxbuy. cannot find spaces. resetting minbuy to 0.'
'minsell is greater than maxsell. cannot find spaces. resetting minsell to 0.'
'Venture ship %s %s %s ordered to mine. num wares in basket: %s.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, @$warebasket.count]
'no warebasket defined. populating ware basket with cargo in hold. adding %s wares to the warebasket.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.count]
'Venture ship %s %s %s can mine ware %s.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $warebasket.{$i}]
'Venture ship %s %s %s either does not have a ware basket or cannot carry mineable wares.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]

'Venture ship %s %s %s was ordered to mine but cannot. Getting new orders.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id]

do_if.value: $forceidle? or (not this.isplayerowned and this.sector and not this.hasrelation.enemy.{this.sector.owner})

debug_text.text: '%s %s %s starting MiningRoutine as resource scout. trying to get resource probes.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]
'%s %s %s starting MiningRoutine with no ore collectors. trying to get some.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]
'%s %s %s starting MiningRoutine with no gas collectors. trying to get some.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]
'unable to get resource probes. idling and trying again later.'
'unable to get collector drones. idling and trying again later.'
'%1 has cargo capacity of %2!'.[this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.capacity.all]

'job ship %s %s %s with job %s had no warebasket. recovering with job-defined basket: %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, this.assignedcontrolled.job, this.assignedcontrolled.warebasket.list]
'mining without warebasket defined in jobs not supported!'

'range is null. attempting to recover.
commander setting: %s
commander sector: %s
jobmainsector: %s
current sector: %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.commanderentity.$config_subordinate_range, @this.assignedcontrolled.commanderentity.sector.knownname, @this.assignedcontrolled.jobmainsector.knownname, @this.assignedcontrolled.sector.knownname]

'failed to recover. $range is null. object is neither in a sector nor in a highway that goes to a sector.\nzone: %s %s\nzone parent: %s %s %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.zone.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.zone, this.assignedcontrolled.zone.parent.class, @this.assignedcontrolled.zone.parent.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.zone.parent]

'$range: %s still null after attempted recovery. idling before trying again later.
jobmainsector: %s %s, exists: %s
current sector: %s %s
in highway: %s, highway destination sector: %s %s'.[@$range, @this.assignedcontrolled.jobmainsector.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.jobmainsector, this.assignedcontrolled.jobmainsector.exists, @this.assignedcontrolled.sector.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.sector, this.assignedcontrolled.zone.isclass.highway, @this.assignedcontrolled.zone.destination.sector.knownname, @this.assignedcontrolled.zone.destination.sector]

do_if.value: this.isplayerowned and $maxbuy le 0 and not ($strictgathersector? and $strictgathersector.exists and $strictgathersector.isclass.sector) and not $gatheringspaces.indexof.{$range} and $range.isclass.sector

debug_text.text: 'adding %s to gatheringspaces'.[$range.knownname]
'%s %s %s found %s gathering spaces.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $gatheringspaces.count]

do_if.value: this.isplayerowned and $maxsell le 0 and not $sellspaces.indexof.{$range} and $range.isclass.sector

debug_text.text: 'adding %s to sellspaces'.[$range.knownname]
'%s %s %s found %s sell spaces.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $sellspaces.count]

'No gatheringspaces and no sellspaces. %s %s %s in sector %s cannot operate. Idling for a while and trying again later in case conditions change.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, @this.assignedcontrolled.sector.knownname]

'[GT-MiningRoutine][ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + '] NO_GATHER_OR_SELL minbuy=' + $minbuy + ' maxbuy=' + $maxbuy + ' minsell=' + $minsell + ' maxsell=' + $maxsell + ' range=' + $range + ' strictGather=' + (if $strictgathersector? and $strictgathersector.exists then $strictgathersector.knownname else 'null')
'old anchor space was hostile. changing to %s %s.'.[$range.class, $range.knownname]

do_if.value: this.sector and this.hasrelation.enemy.{this.sector.owner} and not @this.hasrelation.enemy.{$range.owner} and not @this.assignedcontrolled.commander.hascontext.{$range}

debug_text.text: 'sector we are currently in is hostile. moving to safe space.'
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Delivery-only slice - selling in-bay cargo without mining'

do_if.value: $primaryTargetStations.count gt 0 and $warebasket.count == 1 and not $resourcescout and $physicalStorageAbortPercent gt 0 and $checkDemandFirst

debug_text.text: '[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Physical storage gate action=' + $physGateAction + ' ware=' + $physGateWare.name

do_if.value: not $resourcescout and this.assignedcontrolled.iscapitalship and ((this.assignedcontrolled.waretransport.indexof.{waretransport.solid} and not this.assignedcontrolled.units.{unitcategory.orecollector}.count) or (this.assignedcontrolled.waretransport.indexof.{waretransport.liquid} and not this.assignedcontrolled.units.{unitcategory.gascollector}.count))

debug_text.text: '%s %s %s has no collector drones. looping back to prep.'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]
'%1 (%2) ready to resupply.'.[this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled]

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.free.all le 0 or (not $cannotsell? and this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.capacity.all gt 0 and ((this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.free.all)f / this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.capacity.all le 0.5))

debug_text.text: player.age + ' looking good, starting new mining run'

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.resourceprobescantime and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Miner? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Miner.$ScaleResourceProbeScanByPilotLevel? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Miner.$ScaleResourceProbeScanByPilotLevel
this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

debug_text.text: '[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Probe scan wait GT level ' + $gtPilotLevel + ' base=' + $scanWaitBase + ' scaled=' + $scanWaitScaled
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Preserve selected ware from caller: ' + $warebasket.{1}.name
'%s resources to check'.[$resources_to_check.count]
'critical ware: %s not wanted by station. ignoring shortage.'.[$locware]
'shortage ware: %s not wanted by station. ignoring shortage.'.[$locware]
'shortage detected. will try to purchase %s wares for %s %s %s. num critical wares: %s'.[$resources_shortage.count, @$homebase.idcode, @$homebase.knownname, $homebase, $resources_critical.count]
'critical shortage detected of %s wares.'.[$resources_critical.count]
'%s not in manual ware basket. removing.'.[$locware]
'no wares left after filtering through manual ware basket.'
'skipping shortages and trying again.'
'no wares left after filtering through manual ware basket.'

'%s %s %s updating warebasket. wares added? %s, wares removed? %s\nnew warebasket: %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $basketchanged?, $locwares.count != $warebasket.count, $warebasket]
'Home base: %s %s %s does not need anything at the moment. Waiting to check again.'.[@$homebase.idcode, @$homebase.knownname, $homebase]
player.age + ' homebase %1 [%2] has %3 offers for %4'.[$homebase.knownname, $homebase, $buyoffers.count, $warebasket]
player.age + ' %1 wants %5(want %2, expecting %4) units of %3'.[$homebase.knownname, $buyofferamount, $buyoffer.ware, $reserved, [$buyofferamount - $reserved, 0].max]

create_list.name: $miningbasket
create_list.comment: Ware list sorted by most needed wares

create_list.name: $neededamounts
create_list.comment: Associated offer amounts for the sorted wares

debug_text.text: 'ware: %s, amount: %s, priority: %s'.[$miningbasket.{$i}, $neededamounts.{$i}, $priorities.{$i}]
player.age + ' homebase: no shoppinglist from buy offers — falling back to warebasket for mining'

do_if.value: ($warebasket.count gt 1) and ((global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly and this.ship.pilot? and this.ship.pilot.skill.piloting ge 6) or ((not global.$GT_GlobalSettings? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) and this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level ge 6) or ($effectiveskill == 100))

debug_text.text: player.age + ' found %1 buy offers in %2. ware basket: %3'.[$buyoffers_evaluate.count, $sellspaces.{$i}.knownname, $warebasket]
'adding %1 to mining basket. price: %2. mining table: %3.'.[$buyoffers_evaluate.{$j}.ware, $buyoffers_evaluate.{$j}.relativeprice, $miningtable]
'offers found for everything in the basket! looked through ' + $i + ' clusters.'
'trade offers for %1 wares found. %2 wares in the ware basket.'.[$miningtable.keys.count, $warebasket.count]
'mining basket assembled: ' + $miningbasket
'no offers found after going through %1 clusters. %2 wares in the warebasket.'.[$sellspaces.count, $warebasket.count]
'backup mining basket: ' + $miningbasket
player.age + ' unable to find minable resources, waiting...'

'[GT-MiningRoutine][ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + '] EMPTY_MINING_BASKET warebasket=' + $warebasket + ' homebase=' + (if @$homebase.exists then $homebase.idcode else 'null') + ' homebaseOp=' + @$homebase.isoperational + ' playerStationsOnly=' + $playerStationsOnly

'[GT-Miner-DIAG] FAIL_EMPTY_BASKET ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ', reason=' + $failurereason + ', default=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? then @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.order? then @this.assignedcontrolled.order.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists then this.assignedcontrolled.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', warebasket=' + $warebasket + ', miningbasket=' + $miningbasket
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Rejected caller-resolved sector ' + $resolvedsector.knownname + ' outside strict gather lock ' + $strictgathersector.knownname
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Caller-resolved target ware=' + $ware.name + ' sector=' + $sector.knownname
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Rejected find_target sector ' + $findTargetResult.$Sector.knownname + ' outside strict gather lock ' + $strictgathersector.knownname
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Rejected mining sector ' + $sector.knownname + ' outside strict gather lock ' + $strictgathersector.knownname
player.age + ' there is %1 in sector %2'.[$ware, $sector.knownname]

do_if.value: $neededamounts? and $neededIdx? and $neededIdx gt 0 and $neededIdx le $neededamounts.count and $neededamounts.{$neededIdx}?

debug_text.text: 'reserving storage for %s %s'.[$minamount, $ware]

set_value.name: $failurereason
set_value.comment: No resources found in allowed sectors.

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner-DIAG] FAIL_NO_RESOURCE ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ', reason=' + $failurereason + ', default=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? then @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.order? then @this.assignedcontrolled.order.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists then this.assignedcontrolled.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', miningbasket=' + $miningbasket + ', gatherN=' + $gatheringspaces.count + ', sellN=' + $sellspaces.count
'%1 %5 %3 %4 Could not find any ware, waiting. Mining basket: %2'.[player.age, $miningbasket, this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.class]

'[GT-MiningRoutine][ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + '] NO_SECTOR_FOR_WARE lastWare=' + (if $ware? then $ware.name else 'null') + ' miningbasket=' + $miningbasket + ' minrating=' + $minrating + ' gatherN=' + $gatheringspaces.count + ' sellN=' + $sellspaces.count + ' minbuy=' + $minbuy + ' maxbuy=' + $maxbuy + ' minsell=' + $minsell + ' maxsell=' + $maxsell + ' deepspace=' + $deepspace + ' BLsectorActivity=' + $gt_bl_seca + ' BLsectorTravel=' + $gt_bl_trv + ' BLobjectActivity=' + $gt_bl_obj

'[GT-MiningRoutine][ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + '] gather#' + $i + ' ' + $gatheringspaces.{$i}.knownname + ' resExists=' + $gatheringspaces.{$i}.resources.{$ware}.exists + ' yieldR=' + @$gatheringspaces.{$i}.yieldrating.{$ware} + ' minrating=' + $minrating
'[GT-MiningRoutine][ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + '] gather#' + $i + ' ' + $gatheringspaces.{$i}.class + ' ' + $gatheringspaces.{$i}.knownname + ' (non-sector)'
'decided to mine %1 in %2, %3. secwares: %4'.[$ware, $sector.knownname, $sector.cluster.knownname, $secwares]
'going long-distance to %1 relative to %2 %3.'.[$pos_sector, $sector.class, $sector]
'Unable to reach destination. Aborting.'
'[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': resource area no longer valid for ' + (if $ware? then $ware.name else 'ware') + ' - deliver partial cargo and end slice for re-score'
'%s %s %s moving to mine %s in %s %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, @this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $ware, $sector.class, $sector.knownname]

do_if.value: $primaryTargetStations.count gt 0 and $warebasket.count == 1 and not $resourcescout and $physicalStorageAbortPercent gt 0 and $checkDemandFirst

debug_text.text: '[GT-MiningRoutine] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Physical storage gate (pre-collect) action=' + $physGatePreCollectAction + ' ware=' + $ware.name

set_value.name: $searchHomeSector
set_value.exact: if $homebase? and $homebase.exists and $homebase.sector? then @$homebase.sector else (if $range? and $range.isclass.sector then $range else (if $range? and $range.sector? then @$range.sector else this.assignedcontrolled.sector))

set_value.name: $gt_distancepenalty
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_AIParameters? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{this.assignedcontrolled}? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$DistancePenalty? then (global.$GT_AIParameters.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$DistancePenalty / 50.0) else 0.02

do_if.value: not $overflowSellMode and $primaryTargetStations? and $primaryTargetStations.count gt 0 and $sellCargoWares.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Sell search result: playerOnly=' + $playerStationsOnly + ', overflow=' + $overflowSellMode + ', ownerFilter=' + $sellOwnerFilter + ', ignoreTradeRules=' + $sellIgnoreTradeRules + ', primaryTargets=' + (if $primaryTargetStations? then $primaryTargetStations.count else 0) + ', primaryDirectOffers=' + $primaryDirectBuyOffers + ', sellSpaces=' + (if $sellspaces? then $sellspaces.count else 0) + ', maxSell=' + $searchMaxDistance + ', home=' + (if $searchHomeSector? and $searchHomeSector.exists then $searchHomeSector.knownname else 'NONE') + ', cargoWares=' + $sellCargoWares.count + ' [' + $sellCargoDetail + '], liveBuyOffers=' + $liveBuyOffers.count + ' (sectorScan=' + $liveBuyOffersFromSearch + ')'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': player-only search space[' + $ssi + ']=' + (if $dbgSpace? and $dbgSpace.exists then $dbgSpace.knownname else 'NULL') + ', gatedistanceFromHome=' + (if $dbgSpace? and $dbgSpace.exists and $searchHomeSector? and $searchHomeSector.exists then $searchHomeSector.gatedistance.{$dbgSpace} else -1)

do_if.value: not $sellStation? or not $sellStation.exists or not $sellStation.isplayerowned or $isPrimarySellStation

param.name: sellSector
param.value: if $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists and $sellStation.sector? then @$sellStation.sector else null

wait.comment: Cooperative yield after route_legality call (wake-loop guard)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Sell offer filtering: raw=' + $liveBuyOffers.count + ', accepted=' + $sellAcceptedOffers + ', skipNoWare=' + $sellSkipNoWare + ', skipNoAmount=' + $sellSkipNoAmount + ', skipOutOfRange=' + $sellSkipOutOfRange + ', skipPolicy=' + $sellSkipPolicy + ', skipBlockedStation=' + $sellSkipBlockedStation + ', skipRouteIllegal=' + $sellSkipRouteIllegal + ', builtTrades=' + $sellOnlyTrades.count

param.name: sellSector
param.value: if $bestTrade.$SellStation? and $bestTrade.$SellStation.exists and $bestTrade.$SellStation.sector? then @$bestTrade.$SellStation.sector else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] %s using GT pipeline: selling to %s (distance=%s, score=%s)'.[this.assignedcontrolled.idcode, $bestTrade.$SellStation.knownname, $bestTrade.$Distance, $bestTrade.$Score]
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Trades built but no buyoffer selected by scorer. tradeCount=' + $sellOnlyTrades.count

set_value.name: $failurereason
set_value.comment: No buyers found in allowed sectors.

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner-DIAG] FAIL_NO_BUYER ship=' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ', reason=' + $failurereason + ', default=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? then @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.order? then @this.assignedcontrolled.order.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists then this.assignedcontrolled.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', buyoffers=' + (if $buyoffers? then $buyoffers.count else 'undef') + ', sellspaces=' + (if $sellspaces? then $sellspaces.count else 'undef') + ', miningbasket=' + (if $miningbasket? then $miningbasket else 'undef (gathering branch was skipped this cycle - ship likely arrived with cargo)')

'clamped amount: %s, buyoffer amount: %s, buyoffer desiredamount: %s, amount in hold: %s\ntrade price: %s, station cash: %s'.[$amount, $buyofferamount, $buyoffer.desiredamount, this.assignedcontrolled.cargo.{$buyoffer.ware}.count, ($amount * $buyoffer.unitprice).formatted.default, $buyoffer.buyer.money.formatted.default]

'creating trade order to sell %1 %2 to %3 (%4, %5) for %6Cr'.[$amount, $resource_ware, $resource_buyer.knownname, $resource_buyer, $resource_buyer.idcode, ($amount * $buyoffer.unitprice).formatted.default]

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$ActiveTradePolicy
set_value.exact: table[ $AllowIllegal = $allowIllegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $Ware = $resource_ware, $BuySector = this.assignedcontrolled.sector, $SellSector = if $resource_buyer? and $resource_buyer.exists and $resource_buyer.sector? then @$resource_buyer.sector else null, $HomeSector = $searchHomeSector, $RouteStart = this.assignedcontrolled.sector, $Leg = 'sell', $LogbookEntries = $logbookentries, $SetAt = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '%1 (%2) dropped %3 %4 because that ware is unsellable in %5'.[this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled, $droppedamounts.{$d}, $droppedwares.{$d}, this.cluster.knownname]

'script ends with reason %1. Looking to gather %4 for job \'%5\'. This ship %2 m away from destination, destination %3'.[$failreason, this.assignedcontrolled.distanceto.[$sector, $pos_sector], $sector.knownname, @$warebasket, this.assignedcontrolled.job]
'script ends with reason %s. Looking to gather %s for job \'%s\'.'.[$failreason, @$warebasket, this.assignedcontrolled.job]
'%1 doing job %2 has expired, die!'.[this.assignedcontrolled.knownname, this.assignedcontrolled.job]
'on_abort: removing ware reservation. current order: %s, this order exists: %s'.[@this.assignedcontrolled.order.id, $thisorder.exists]
'on_abort: updating duration from %s to %s'.[$duration, $duration - [(player.age - $time_start), $duration - 1s].min]
